text:
(In reply to iio7 from comment #2)

Sorry, you are wrong. What's written in Makefile, is

# Created by: Simon 'corecode' Schubert <corecode@corecode.ath.cx>

which is only a comment, possibly no longer relevant. Look into Makefile.claws, line 5 starting with MAINTAINER=, that's relevant and actual one. Anyway, upgrade PR is pending...
